title: polystichum triangulum
intro: Polystichum triangulum, also known as the silverback fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum triangulum include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially preventing certain types of cancer. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
